title: Opinions about DIM
body:
This supplement was recommended by a friend. Who is a researcher 
Personality I trust him more than I trust doctor. And in the pharmaceutical industry all doctors make comission somehow.
Here is part of his chat with me
"estrogen is not the problem, estrogen is necessary. however there are two types of estrogen “estrone” which is bad and “estradiol” which is good. DIM helps balance hormones naturally by reducing the bad estrogen"
He told me to take in conjunction with the estrogen blocker.

Now my question 
Have you heard about this?
